form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at Flemington in the G1 Empire Rose November 1 over 1600m, 6 len behind Pride Of Jenni carrying 57kg at $41. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.25 len Caulfield F&M Bm78 May 31 over 1200m defeating Empress Of Wonder carrying 56.5kg at $2.80. Resumes after a recent trial win. Good fresh mare with excellent first-up credentials.

form.formComment: Second run back. Is a two-time winner at black-type level who was too good for Group Three company last start when first up from a spell, saluting by a long neck in the Maurice McCarten Stakes over 1100m at Rosehill. Untapped filly who can keep the winning momentum going.
